title: syntherisma ternata
intro: Syntherisma ternata, also known as the "hairy stem grass," is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall health and well-being.
